body_txt: The show's designers have set Bob up to be The Mole . It's incredibly obvious that Bob is The Mole . Heck, even the other characters on the show are starting to suspect that Bob is The Mole . So here we come to The Reveal , where it turns out... Bob wasn't The Mole after all! Nope, Bob is a totally innocent character who just had a bunch of unfortunate coincidences surrounding him. There may not be a mole at all, but if there is, it will be an entirely different character, and probably the one that everyone suspected least — or even the one who was leading the Mole Hunt in the first place. A Ten Little Murder Victims plot involves most of the cast being these. May involve Divided We Fall . Compare with the Bait-and-Switch Tyrant and Never the Obvious Suspect . Just knowing the work's name can act as a spoiler for this trope. Beware.
